headline: California Manufacturers Power Artemis II Mission Success
summary: Following the safe return of NASA's Artemis II mission to Earth, the California Manufacturers & Technology Association (CMTA) is recognizing California manufacturers' critical role in this historic human spaceflight milestone.

raw.headline: California Manufacturers Power Artemis II Mission Success
raw.summary: Following the safe return of NASA's Artemis II mission to Earth, the California Manufacturers & Technology Association (CMTA) is recognizing California manufacturers' critical role in this historic human spaceflight milestone.

headline: Howmet Aerospace Announces New Executive Leadership Member
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) announced today that Jonathan Arena has joined Howmet as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal and Compliance Officer and Secretary. He will also serve on the Howmet Aerospace Executive Leadership Team, the senior leadership team that sets strategic direction for the company.

raw.headline: Howmet Aerospace Announces New Executive Leadership Member

headline: U.S. Military Adopts Siege Strategy. What It Means for Defense Stocks.
summary: President Donald Trump has flipped the script and is now choosing to choke off global oil demand in hopes of forcing Iran to make a deal.  Defense stocks were mostly higher in early trading on Monday after the events of the weekend.  “The U.S. and Iran failed to reach an agreement in their very brief talks over the weekend,” wrote Vertical Research Partners analyst Rob Stallard in a Monday note.

headline: Richard Branson's Virgin Atlantic To Roll Out Starlink Wi-Fi On Its Boeing 787, A350 Fleet—Elon Musk Calls It 'Gamechanger'
summary: Virgin Atlantic partners with Elon Musk-led Starlink to offer satellite internet service on all its aircraft starting this year.

headline: BOEING CO : Jefferies reiterates its Buy rating
summary: Sheila Kahyaoglu from Jefferies retains his positive opinion on the stock with a Buy rating. The target price is unchanged and still at USD 295.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump lashes out at Iran and the Pope
summary: Failed negotiations with Iran lead U.S. President Trump to announce a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
